headline: Dow Jones Medical Giant Johnson & Johnson Eyes Latest Buy Point
summary: Dow Jones medical giant Johnson & Johnson, along with AstraZeneca, Burlington Stores and TJX, are in or near buy zones Tuesday.

headline: Top 50 High-Quality Dividend Growth Stocks For April 2026
summary: I track a universe of 50 high-quality dividend growth stocks to identify attractive entry points based on updated valuations and forward return estimates.

headline: How The TJX Companies (TJX) Story Is Evolving As Analysts Lift Price Targets
summary: Price targets on TJX Companies have been drifting into the mid to high US$170s, with a few calls reaching the low US$180s, even as the core fair value estimate holds steady at US$171.78. This shift is tied to research that points to consistent execution, resilient traffic, and steady margins within an off price model that analysts view as well positioned in discretionary retail. As you read on, you will see how these views fit together and how to keep up with the evolving TJX...

headline: TJX Companies: Premium Will Fade As Retailers Compete More On Price
summary: Despite strong FY26 execution and 5% comp sales growth, TJX Companies guides to just 2%-3% comp growth and flat margins for FY27. See why TJX stock is a Sell.
